## Type

- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes (lint + unit)
- [ ] New adapter implements the 6 required methods ([`docs/adapter-interface.md`](../docs/adapter-interface.md))
- [ ] No real or private data in examples — use generic names (`writing`, `client-work`, `side-project`)
